The '''Confederate Destroyer''' was a small aquatic [[Repulsorcraft/Legends|repulsorcraft]] used destroy enemy vessels and shore emplacements. The destroyer accomplished this tasks with weapon systems similar to [[Energy pummel/Legends|pummels]] of the era. This unit was most effective against the Republic Cruiser, using the [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser's]] ranged weapon limitations against them.

{{Veh-stub}}
